title: SimpleFov
description: Adjust your fov with customizable keybinds!
body:
# ENG

Adjust your fov with customizable keybinds!

`DEFAULT KEYS`

`INCREASE: EQUAL (=)`

`DECREASE: MINUS (-)`

# RUS

–Ь–µ–љ—П–є —Б–≤–Њ–є –§–Ю–Т —Б –њ–Њ–Љ–Њ—Й—М—О –Ї–ї–∞–≤–Є—И!

`–Ъ–Ы–Р–Т–Ш–®–Ш –Я–Ю –£–Ь–Ю–Ы–І–Р–Э–Ш–Ѓ`

`–£–Т–Х–Ы–Ш–І–Ш–Ґ–ђ: –†–Р–Т–Э–Ю (=)`

`–£–Ь–Х–Э–ђ–®–Ш–Ґ–ђ: –Ь–Ш–Э–£–° (-)`
